guidance_documents.instructions: The vendor integration assessment is COMPLETE and fast-track eligible. You are the primary approver for procurement authority. Review and approve this vendor onboarding within 2–3 business days. The vendor is classified as non-regulated software (UNREGULATED data classification), Tier T1 integration, and presents no DPA or NDA blockers. No security follow-up actions are required. Your approval clears the procurement gate for final business operations sign-off.
next_steps: Review the vendor against Procurement Approval Matrix row C-T1 (non-regulated software, Tier T1)
Verify completion of any internal procurement due diligence
Approve or escalate with rationale within 2–3 business days
Notify Business Owner (Manager+) once procurement approval is granted

guidance_documents.instructions: The vendor integration assessment is COMPLETE and fast-track eligible. You are the secondary approver for business operations authority. The vendor meets all security, legal, and procurement requirements for fast-track approval. Review the vendor's business case and operational fit, then approve within 2–3 business days. No blockers remain. Your approval completes the onboarding authorization.
